text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I arrive back at the academy
after a day out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I was just reflecting on the day. I feel
remarkably refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How about you? Did you enjoy cutting loose a
little?
choice_data_list: I'm just glad you had a good time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's all very flattering, but it was you I was
asking about.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, I do appreciate the way that you always look
out for my well-being.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've experimented with a lot of
different ways of resetting myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Some have been effective, others less so.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But none have left me feeling quite so
rejuvenated as today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's gratifying to hear that Symboli Rudolf has had
a fulfilling day off.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, I'm pleased that you're so enthusiastic.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Although I have to admit, I feel the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've experimented with a lot of
different ways of resetting myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Some have been effective, others less so.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But none have left me feeling quite so
rejuvenated as today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's gratifying to hear that Symboli Rudolf has had
a fulfilling day off.
